_desc: itemref cycle / already-visited guard. Only #org is top-level (Alice and Bob have itemprop, so they are nested). Recursion memory = {org} -> {org,alice} -> {org,alice,bob}. Inside Bob's crawl, itemref='alice' reaches item #alice again (itemprop 'member'); since #alice is already in memory, its value becomes the string "ERROR" (JSON-level cycle guard, spec 6b step 7.2). Bob's properties are ordered by section-3 tree-order: element #alice (document order) precedes Bob's own name span, so 'member' is emitted before 'name'.
